title: Assistant Manager, Field Sales
description:
IN THIS JOB YOU WILL:

  • Seeks and prospects for high value target accounts to win new customers generally in the 100k - 500k range net sales per annum; focusing bringing new customers on board.
  • Builds rapport and trust with customers by being informed about customer's business and the market
  • Assesses the type and size of customer needs and recommends solutions based on these needs by using industry knowledge
  • Closes business connecting a customer need with a DHL solution and the value it may create for the customers
  • Gathers customer and market information to update product and trade lane on current conditions
  • Supports customer retention by conducting joints visits with Product, TL and organizing workshops inviting customers to share information on updated regulations, products, etc.
  • Ensures successful retention of customers by maintaining close liaison with them, ascertaining their satisfaction level via DHL Global Forwarding service standards and to anticipate and/or prevent potential problems.
  • Uses networks within the various Sales channels within DHL to collaborate on customers, marketing strategies and offers a full supply chain of services to service customer needs.
  • Provides forecast in relation to opportunities & pipelines using DGF CRM.
  • Engages pro-actively with Product to resolve commercial / operational issues.
  • Collects relevant customer information for the RFI/RFP/RFQ and prepare documents for customer implementation in order to ensure proper operational handover and implementation to meet customer expectations (SLA's & SOP's).
  • Performs any other duties assigned by immediate superior

YOU HAVE THE FOLLOWING QUALITIES AND QUALIFICATIONS:

  • Deep knowledge in the freight forwarding business
  • Good communication and presentation skills, ideally selling experience in competitive markets
  • High degree of self confidence, initiative and commitment
  • Diploma/ degree with at least 3-4 years of relevant working experience

postedCompany.description:
DHL GLOBAL FORWARDING (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

How do you predict what the world’s going to do next?

That’s the challenge and the reward – of what we do. As the experts in freight forwarding, we deliver 100% assurance to our Customers via a mindset that’s always looking ahead to the next commercial opportunity, predicting the next potential issue, anticipating the next global trend.

Because at DHL Global Forwarding, Freight, we’re not simply about freight forwarding. We’re about forward-thinking ways to connect people – and improve their lives.
